channel.title: GitHub V Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of V in GitHub

item.title: vlang/v
item.description: Simple, fast, safe, compiled language for developing maintainable software. Compiles itself in <1s with zero library dependencies. Supports automatic C => V translation. https://vlang.io

item.title: v-analyzer/v-analyzer
item.description: Bring IDE features for V programming languages in VS Code, Vim and other editors
